meaning: n.珐琅,瓷釉,指甲油vt.涂以瓷釉,彩饰
examples: Teeth have a hard surface layer called enamel.
Made from cast iron, it is finished in graphite enamel.
They click upon themselves as the breeze rises and turns many-colored as the stir cracks and crazes their enamel.
The workmanship of the Rothschild egg is simply extraordinary--the gold work, the wonderful pink enamel.
The Sensodyne spot informed viewers that fruit acids can wear away at tooth enamel.
